flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Kellogg Community College rose 12% between 2017 and 2020 ($15.1k → $17.0k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Kellogg Community College rose 133% between 2006 and 2009 (7.7% → 18.0%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Kellogg Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Kellogg Community College fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.4k → $8.3k).
